--- ж–‡д»¶: core/turn_builder.py (з¬¬ 1 и‡і 351 иЎЊпјЊе…± 351 иЎЊ) ---
   1 | # core/turn_builder.py
   2 | """Conversation turn builder for provider-safe context compression.
   3 | 
   4 | This module converts a flat provider message list into semantic turns.  The
   5 | important invariant is that OpenAI-style ``assistant.tool_calls`` plus their
   6 | immediately following ``tool`` responses are represented as one atomic turn so
   7 | compression strategies can avoid cutting the pair in half.
   8 | """
   9 | 
  10 | from __future__ import annotations
  11 | 
  12 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  13 | import re
  14 | from typing import Any, Dict, Iterable, List, Optional, Set
  15 | 
  16 | 
  17 | @dataclass
  18 | class ConversationTurn:
  19 |     """A semantic, provider-safe unit of conversation history."""
  20 | 
  21 |     id: str
  22 |     start_index: int
  23 |     end_index: int
  24 |     messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  25 |     user_message: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
  26 |     assistant_messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  27 |     tool_messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  28 |     has_tool_calls: bool = False
  29 |     is_tool_pair_complete: bool = True
  30 |     missing_tool_call_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  31 |     orphan_tool_call_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  32 |     token_estimate: int = 0
  33 |     importance: float = 0.0
  34 |     categories: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  35 |     files_touched: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  36 |     errors: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  37 |     tests: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  38 | 
  39 |     @property
  40 |     def is_valid_openai_tool_turn(self) -> bool:
  41 |         """Whether this turn can be sent to OpenAI-compatible APIs as-is."""
  42 |         return self.is_tool_pair_complete and not self.orphan_tool_call_ids
  43 | 
  44 | 
  45 | class TurnBuilder:
  46 |     """Build complete conversation turns from a flat message list.
  47 | 
  48 |     Rules implemented for OpenAI-compatible tool calls:
  49 |     - an ``assistant`` message with ``tool_calls`` starts an atomic tool turn;
  50 |     - only immediately following contiguous ``tool`` messages can satisfy that
  51 |       assistant's tool calls;
  52 |     - missing tool responses mark the turn incomplete;
  53 |     - ``tool`` messages without an immediately preceding assistant tool-call
  54 |       turn are emitted as orphan/incomplete turns instead of being attached to
  55 |       unrelated context.
  56 |     """
  57 | 
  58 |     ERROR_KEYWORDS = ("error", "exception", "traceback", "failed", "failure", "е¤±иґҐ", "й”™иЇЇ", "жЉҐй”™")
  59 |     TEST_KEYWORDS = ("pytest", "unittest", "test", "жµ‹иЇ•", "passed", "failed", "assertionerror")
  60 |     PLAN_KEYWORDS = ("plan", "todo", "ж­ҐйЄ¤", "з»§з»­", "е®Њж€ђ", "е·Іе®Њж€ђ", "еѕ…еЉћ")
  61 |     FILE_EDIT_KEYWORDS = ("edit_file", "write_full_file", "created", "modified", "deleted", "е€›е»є", "дї®ж”№", "е€ й™¤")
  62 |     FILE_READ_KEYWORDS = ("read_file", "cat ", "иЇ»еЏ–", "жџҐзњ‹ж–‡д»¶")
  63 |     SEARCH_KEYWORDS = ("search_code", "grep", "ripgrep", "жђњзґў")
  64 |     COMMAND_KEYWORDS = ("execute_bash", "pytest", "python ", "npm ", "е‘Ѕд»¤", "иїђиЎЊ")
  65 |     SUCCESS_KEYWORDS = ("passed", "success", "ж€ђеЉџ", "жµ‹иЇ•йЂљиї‡", "вњ…")
  66 |     FAILURE_KEYWORDS = ("failed", "failure", "error", "traceback", "е¤±иґҐ", "й”™иЇЇ", "вќЊ")
  67 | 
  68 |     FILE_PATTERN = re.compile(
  69 |         r"(?<![\w.-])(?:[A-Za-z]:)?[\w.@+-]+(?:[/\\][\w.@+-]+)+\.[A-Za-z0-9]{1,8}(?![\w.-])"
  70 |         r"|(?<![\w.-])[\w.@+-]+\.(?:py|js|ts|tsx|jsx|json|md|txt|yaml|yml|toml|ini|cfg|java|cpp|c|h|rs|go|sh|bat|ps1)(?![\w.-])"
  71 |     )
  72 | 
  73 |     def build(self, messages: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> List[ConversationTurn]:
  74 |         """Return semantic turns while preserving original message order."""
  75 |         turns: List[ConversationTurn] = []
  76 |       ...
